pi_items.source: Task entails debugging Kubernetes Kustomize manifests, which aligns with DevOps and Release Engineering roles.
setup_task.sh explicitly sets namespace to 'payment-staging' and verifier.py/export_result.sh queries this namespace for validation.
setup_task.sh creates the project structure in /home/ga/Desktop/payment-gateway, and export_result.sh validates the Kustomize build at /home/ga/Desktop/payment-gateway/overlays/staging.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Kustomize configuration files created directly by setup_task.sh. It requires the agent to debug and fix these files located at the verified project_path '/home/ga/Desktop/payment-gateway'. The export scripts and verifier validate the deployment and configurations specifically within the 'payment-staging' namespace. The passing score threshold is explicitly defined as 80 points in verifier.py.
